structural_coherence: The 'Course Schedule' section presents tabular data (Week and Tasks) but is not formatted as a markdown table, appearing instead as plain text.

proposals.reasoning: The header 'Grading Policy' is redundant as it immediately follows the main 'Grading Policy' section header and its content should be part of the parent section. The header 'schedule of topics' is redundant as it immediately follows the main 'Course Schedule' section header and its content should be part of the parent section. '<' is an HTML entity that should be converted to '<'. The word 'Syllabus' is redundant in the main course title header (e.g., 'ISEN691 Syllabus' should be 'ISEN691').
